headline: Eric Trump says family assets invested in 'broad market indexes' — Trump's own disclosure lists 3,642 individual trades
summary: New federal filings show the president executed thousands of stock transactions in the first three months of 2026 — including purchases whose timing critics say coincided with his administration's regulatory decisions.

headline: Why Palantir Technologies (PLTR) Stock Is Trading Lower Today
summary: Shares of data analytics company Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ:PLTR) fell 4.2% in the afternoon session after the April PPI report sent Treasury yields to 10-month highs, with the 10-year yield rising to 4.49%.

headline: Why AI layoffs aren't giving stocks the boost companies wanted
summary: AI-driven layoffs have become a defining theme across the tech industry over the past year, with some sources estimating more than 112,000 U.S. jobs being lost to AI since the start of 2025. While major companies like HP and Amazon have often framed these cuts as a way to boost efficiency and shift focus toward new technologies, investors themselves don't appear convinced that these layoffs will improve companies' bottom lines in the long run.
